name: Bone-Chilling Embrace
acquisitionSource: Clear Psyche Deepdive: Sculpted Like a Song
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] Arithmetica and [Block:Arg2] Delayed Shield. If your Tentacle Stance is {Surging Tides}, instead spawn [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|Tentacle|Tentacles}.
lore:
Flesh dissolves into the sea, bones harden into coral. Her gaze burns; she embraces you and sculpts you.

She promises to take you home.
